description_long: This is a cylindrical, black metal waste bin mounted on a sturdy frame with two vertical supports and a horizontal base for stability. The bin features a perforated pattern on its body, likely for ventilation and to reduce weight, and a solid rim at the top. There is a small protruding tab or handle on one side, possibly for lifting or securing a liner. The frame is robust, with angled feet designed to keep the bin upright and stable on urban surfaces. The front of the bin displays an embossed emblem or insignia, adding a decorative or municipal touch. The interior appears hollow and open, suitable for collecting trash or recyclables in public outdoor settings.
description: A black metal cylindrical waste bin with a perforated body, mounted on a sturdy frame and featuring an embossed emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the perforated bin, sturdy frame, and a visible emblem on the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid back support and the open top of the bin.
description_view_2: Alternate front view similar to view 0, with the emblem and frame visible but from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Back view showing the vertical support and the open, unadorned rear of the bin.
